seoTitle: Canungra vs Cape Cleveland — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Canungra and Cape Cleveland. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Canungra vs Cape Cleveland: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Canungra and Cape Cleveland.
heading: Canungra vs Cape Cleveland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Canungra, Queensland and Cape Cleveland, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Cleveland has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Canungra (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Canungra or Cape Cleveland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Canungra has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Cape Cleveland scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Canungra scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Cape Cleveland scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Canungra or Cape Cleveland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Cleveland has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
